overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy game showing an armored character holding a lantern exploring a snow-covered rural village at night during a blizzard. The character moves from narrow paths between log cabins into open snowfields where visibility drops to near zero due to heavy snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered log cabin exterior with icicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the exterior wall of a log cabin covered in icicles, holding a lantern to light the way through falling snow

entered.detail: large wooden log cabin with snow-covered roof and icicles hanging from the eaves
long icicles hanging from the roof edge of the cabin
old wooden cart partially buried in snow
deep snow covering the ground with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the side of a large log cabin at night during a snowstorm. Icicles hang from the roof edge, and an old wooden cart sits partially buried in snow to the right. The lantern illuminates the immediate path through the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village center with scattered log cabins

events.description: moves from the narrow cabin corridor into the more open village center with multiple structures

agents.ego_description: navigating through the snowy village past several wooden cabins and snow-laden pine trees

entered.detail: smaller wooden cabins scattered throughout the village area
tall pine trees heavy with snow on their branches
simple wooden fence posts marking property boundaries

segments.scene_description: Leaving the main cabin behind, the character enters a more open village area with multiple log cabins and snow-covered pine trees. The wooden cart becomes more prominent on the right as the character navigates through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between village and open snow field

events.description: visibility decreases significantly as the character moves into the open field away from village structures

agents.ego_description: leaving the village behind and entering the open snow field where the blizzard intensifies and snow drifts deepen

entered.detail: large drifts of snow forming small dunes in the open field
rock outcroppings barely visible through the falling snow

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the village into open terrain, leaving the last cabins behind. Snow dunes form in the open field, and visibility begins to drop as the blizzard intensifies. The pine trees recede into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field during heavy blizzard with near-zero visibility

events.description: heavy blizzard creates whiteout conditions with only the lantern light visible in the immediate vicinity

agents.ego_description: trudging through deep snow in near whiteout conditions, relying on the lantern to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: large mounds of snow forming obstacles in the deep field

segments.scene_description: In the open snow field, the blizzard reaches whiteout intensity with near-zero visibility. The character continues forward through deep snow, with only the lantern light cutting through the darkness. Snow mounds and dunes are the only features visible in the immediate area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered perimeter of a rural village into a blinding, open-field blizzard. It begins beside a large log cabin where icicles hang from the eaves and a wooden cart sits partially buried in the snow. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wider settlement area filled with scattered cabins and snow-covered pine trees. The camera then transitions away from the village structures and into open terrain, where the pine trees recede and the wind begins to whip snow into high dunes. Finally, the environment shifts into a total whiteout as the blizzard intensifies, leaving only the glow of the lantern to cut through the near-zero visibility of the deep snowfields.
